productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Yellow T-shirt
description: Composition Yellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and brand name in flock print across the chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron on decorations Subtle and stylish, this yellow t-shirt from united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The branding across the chest enhances your sophisticated fashion statement, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look this winter. Model statistics The product is a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
